Problem: Video Game Store Management

Description:



A reduced version of an application to manage a video game store is to be implemented.

For each video game, the following attributes must be stored:

Name. The maximum number of characters for the video game name is 15.
Console. The console for which the video game is designed. The possible consoles are: PLAYSTATION, XBOX, and SWITCH.
Price. A real number measured in euros.
Stock. An integer indicating the number of units available for sale.
The store can have a maximum of 50 video games.

The program must:

Allow the user to enter the above attributes for each video game.
If the user enters a console option that is not one of the valid choices (PLAYSTATION, XBOX, SWITCH), the default option PLAYSTATION will be assigned.
When asking the user to enter the console, the program must display:
         PLAYSTATION

         XBOX

         SWITCH

         In this way, the user will enter 1, 2, or 3 depending on the desired console.

Display the complete list of video games in the store with all their attributes.
The program must select video games that run on a given console and whose price is below a given value. For this, the program will receive these two pieces of information as command-line arguments of main.
The program must implement the following menu:

Add video game
Show store video games
Select video games by console/price
Exit
The use of an enumeration for each menu option will be valued.



Remember that structures and enumerations must be used. 



The following functions must be used:

/* Function to read a line of text /

void readLine(char *string, int size);



/* Function that inputs the attributes of a video game /

VideoGame_t enterVideoGame();



/ Function that displays the store's video games with their attributes */

void showVideoGames(VideoGame_t *store, int count);



/ Function that displays the store's video games that match the filter */

void selectVideoGames(VideoGame_t *store, int count, Console_e filterConsole, float maxPrice);



The use of the following functions from the <stdlib.h> library is allowed:

atoi, strtol, atof, and strtof. Their prototypes are:



// Converts a string to an integer (int)

int atoi(const char *str);



// Converts a string to a long number with a specified base

long strtol(const char *str, char **endptr, int base);



// Converts a string to a double-precision floating-point number (double)

double atof(const char str);

 

// Converts a string to a single-precision floating-point number (float)

float strtof(const char str, char endptr);

 



Example of execution:



$ ./videogames_managment_2.exe

Usage: ./gestion_videojuegos_2 <console(1-PLAYSTATION,2-XBOX,3-SWITCH)> <max_price>



$ ./videogames_managment_2.exe 1 10.50



---- VIDEO GAME STORE MENU ----

1. Add video game

2. Show store video games

3. Select video games by console/price

4. Exit

Option: 1

Video game name (max 15 characters): Minecraft

Select console:

1 - PLAYSTATION

2 - XBOX

3 - SWITCH

Option: 1

Price (€): 10.10

Stock: 1



---- VIDEO GAME STORE MENU ----

1. Add video game

2. Show store video games

3. Select video games by console/price

4. Exit

Option: 1

Video game name (max 15 characters): Tetris

Select console:

1 - PLAYSTATION

2 - XBOX

3 - SWITCH

Option: 2

Price (€): 12.12

Stock: 2



---- VIDEO GAME STORE MENU ----

1. Add video game

2. Show store video games

3. Select video games by console/price

4. Exit

Option: 1

Video game name (max 15 characters): Wii Sports

Select console:

1 - PLAYSTATION

2 - XBOX

3 - SWITCH

Option: 3

Price (€): 11.11

Stock: 3



---- VIDEO GAME STORE MENU ----

1. Add video game

2. Show store video games

3. Select video games by console/price

4. Exit

Option: 2



Video game 1

Name: Minecraft

Console: PLAYSTATION

Price: 10.10 €

Stock: 1



Video game 2

Name: Tetris

Console: XBOX

Price: 12.12 €

Stock: 2



Video game 3

Name: Wii Sports

Console: SWITCH

Price: 11.11 €

Stock: 3



---- VIDEO GAME STORE MENU ----

1. Add video game

2. Show store video games

3. Select video games by console/price

4. Exit

Option: 3



Name: Minecraft

Console: PLAYSTATION

Price: 10.00 €

Stock: 1



---- VIDEO GAME STORE MENU ----

1. Add video game

2. Show store video games

3. Select video games by console/price

4. Exit

Option: 4

Exiting program...
